untranslatable_reason: Signal requires dynamic price target calculation based on candle height ratios (height/6 for upside, height/3 for downside) with context-dependent entry direction. The backtest engine does not support parametric target calculation or regime-based directional switching at signal generation. Additionally, 'BULL_MARKET' and 'BEAR_MARKET' are not in the ALLOWED_REGIMES list. The signal also references performance metrics by shadow type that require pre-classification logic not expressible in simple condition rules.
translation_notes: This pattern requires: (1) candle height calculation as (high-low), (2) separate upside target = (height/6) + high and downside target = (height/3) subtracted from high, (3) regime detection to determine breakout direction, (4) shadow classification (short vs tall) based on performance data. These require custom logic outside the standard 3-field condition structure. Recommend implementing as a custom pattern detector or separate rules engine module.
